request_payload.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how outdated laws hamper our ability to protect citizens. We need expanded domestic security powers to keep up with evolving threats. The balance between security and civil liberties is complex, but we can't afford to be reactive. Trust the experts who understand these nuances.
